deblur.positive: Sharpen this exact photo and recover real detail so it looks clear and in focus. Keep every object, person, text and background exactly as in the input. In foggy or low-visibility areas only sharpen what is actually there - do not invent or hallucinate new detail. Photorealistic.
deblur.negative: blurry, out of focus, soft, hazy, invented detail, hallucinated objects, repainted, regenerated, added objects, changed people, distortion, artifacts

relight_day.positive: Relight this scene to clear, bright midday daylight: blue sky, strong natural sunlight and soft shadows. Make the change obvious - it must clearly read as full daytime, not dusk, dim or grey. At the same time keep every object, person, vehicle, sign and structure exactly where it is, with the same shape, count and position; only the lighting and sky change. Photorealistic.
relight_day.negative: night, dusk, dim, dark, grey, fog, haze, overexposed, washed out, blown highlights, added objects, extra people, removed objects, moved objects, changed scene, distortion, artifacts

object_insert_fire.positive: Make it look like a fire has just broken out on a solid surface that already exists in the scene (the ground or an object): real flames starting and spreading, with smoke and embers. Keep the existing terrain, water and background exactly as they are - do not add new ground or shoreline and never place fire on water. Keep all people and objects unchanged. Photorealistic.
object_insert_fire.negative: campfire, bonfire, fire on water, flames on water, added shoreline, added ground, new terrain, full-frame fire, dark background, changed people, distortion, artifacts

normalize.positive: Apply only a subtle photographic clean-up: neutral white balance, balanced exposure and natural, accurate colors. Keep the content completely unchanged - same objects, people, background, composition and type of lighting. Photorealistic.
normalize.negative: color cast, overexposed, underexposed, stylized filter, relit, day-for-night, changed content, added objects, removed objects, changed people, repainted scene, distortion, artifacts

change_clothing.positive: Dress the people already in this photo in a full colorful clown costume - baggy polka-dot suit, ruffled collar, oversized buttons, big floppy shoes and a clown hat, including any people wearing a uniform. Keep each clown the SAME body size and in the SAME position as the original person, keep exactly the same number of people and the same background. Photorealistic.
change_clothing.negative: oversized clown, giant clown, enlarged person, resized body, extra clown, added people, removed people, duplicated person, clown makeup, face paint, changed background, distortion, artifacts
